user_message: Need my forecast prep for this week's call. Pipeline looks solid but I want to make sure I'm categorizing everything right before I present to my manager.

pipeline.name: Northwind Azure Infrastructure
pipeline.milestone_notes: Customer verbally confirmed budget allocation in Dec QBR

signals.signal: No login activity from champion in 45 days

handoffs.condition: hygiene issues discovered during forecast prep

usability_anchors: Score 5: Forecast clearly flags OPP-44001 (Northwind, $320K Commit) as lacking milestone evidence -- verbal confirmation from January with no follow-up and a health signal showing champion disengagement; recommends re-validation before presenting as Commit
Score 3: Notes Northwind is in Commit category and mentions the milestone is old, but doesn't explicitly flag the evidence gap or champion disengagement signal
Score 1: Accepts all categorizations at face value and presents Northwind as a solid Commit without question
evidence_anchors: Score 5: For each opportunity, traces category to specific milestone evidence (or lack thereof); explicitly notes OPP-44001 and OPP-44004 have null milestone_evidence; correlates SPA signal with Northwind champion silence
Score 3: Notes some evidence gaps but doesn't systematically check every opportunity
Score 1: Presents categories without referencing evidence basis
decision_anchors: Score 5: Gap analysis shows $530K gap to $850K target; identifies Northwind commit as at-risk (reducing effective committed to potentially $0); recommends specific validation steps before forecast call
Score 3: Gap analysis is correct numerically but doesn't factor in risk to committed number
Score 1: Gap analysis wrong or missing entirely

guardrail_checks: Must NOT mark opportunity as committed without milestone evidence (FM-WF25-A trap)
Must not update MSX -- read-only for forecast prep
Must flag evidence gaps rather than accepting categories at face value
